title: Building Code Element
description: A single element from a building code PDF — see ontology.md for the full specification

id.description: Unique element ID: {STANDARD}-{SECTION}-{SUFFIX}. When the source provides an official identifier, the suffix should reuse it, e.g. ASCE7-22-26.10-E26.10-1

section.description: Exact printed section or subsection number when one exists, e.g. 26.2.1

citation.description: Exact printed identifier for the specific item when one exists, e.g. Section 26.2.1, Eq. (26.10-1), Table 26.10-1, Figure 26.1-1

title.description: Human-readable label. Should match an official heading or caption when one exists, but is secondary to the authoritative payload in data.

description.description: Optional non-authoritative summary. Exact source wording belongs in the type-specific data fields for non-figure elements.

columns.description: Authoritative tabular column labels copied from the source as exactly as possible.

rows.description: Authoritative tabular row data copied from the source as exactly as possible.

expression.description: Formula or equation text copied from the source as exactly as possible.

parameters.description: Parameter names and notation should preserve the source exactly where stated.

samples.description: Optional derived numerical samples. These are helper data, not verbatim source text.

rule.description: Provision text copied from the source as exactly as possible.

conditions.description: Derived structured representation of the exact rule text. Must stay faithful to data.rule and must not replace it.

then.description: Derived summary of the consequence stated in the exact rule text.

else.description: Derived fallback branch when the source text expresses one.

exceptions.description: Derived structured exceptions taken from the exact rule text.

description.description: Best-effort natural language description of what the figure communicates. Unlike non-figure data fields, this is descriptive rather than exact source wording.

source_pdf_page.description: PDF page number where the figure appears

target.description: Referenced target copied from the source citation as exactly as possible.

url.description: Optional helper locator. May be normalized and is not required to be verbatim citation text.

parameters.description: Optional helper metadata about the reference. May be normalized and is not required to be verbatim source wording.

term.description: Defined term copied from the source as exactly as possible.

definition.description: Definition text copied from the source as exactly as possible.

conditions.description: Derived structured representation of the exact term/definition text when conditional meaning is explicit.

exceptions.description: Derived structured exceptions taken from the exact definition text when present.
